title: Model Guidance Snapshot
description: Reproducibility-preserving snapshot of current model prompt guidance. Written once per production batch by the Model Research Agent. Each prompt record cites the snapshot that informed it.

model_id.description: Canonical snake_case model identifier. Maps to docs/model_guides/{model_id}.yaml.

snapshot_taken_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the snapshot was written.

snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the snapshot file content (self-referential; computed after write).

model_version_observed.description: Model version string as observed in official docs or platform UI (e.g. 'Midjourney 6.1', 'unknown_ui_current').

model_version_confidence.description: Confidence that model_version_observed is accurate. high=official docs; medium=verified 3rd party; low=community-reported.

http_status.description: HTTP status code of the source fetch. Use 0 to indicate 'not fetched' (placeholder snapshots only).

source_class.description: Only approved source classes. forum_threads, prompt_hack_blogs, unsourced_social_media, and paid_prompt_packs are blocked.

extracted_rules.description: Concrete prompt-writing rules extracted from sources. Must cite a source; no invented rules.

confidence.description: Overall confidence in the snapshot. high=all official docs; medium=mix of verified sources; low=community-reported (flagged for human review).

do_not_use_without_verification.description: Stylistic shorthands or rules that require human verification before use in prompts.

snapshot_validity.description: Freshness policy for this snapshot. Embedded to make each snapshot self-describing.

max_age_days.description: Maximum age in days before this snapshot must be refreshed. 14 for image models, 7 for video models.

schema_version.description: Schema version used to write this snapshot. Allows future migration.

blocked_source_classes.description: These source classes are NEVER allowed in sources[*].source_class: forum_threads, prompt_hack_blogs, unsourced_social_media, paid_prompt_packs

snapshot_freshness_policy.description: image_models (midjourney, chatgpt_image, nano_banana): max_age_days=14. video_models (kling_omni): max_age_days=7. Refresh required before: batch_prompt_generation, model_version_change, failed_output_rate > 0.5.
